name: FoodOnlineDjango
summary: Marketplace multi-vendor com RazorPay, roles Vendor/Customer e busca geoespacial.

nodes.title: FoodOnlineDjango
nodes.description: Plataforma multi-vendor de delivery com Django 5, PostGIS e RazorPay.
nodes.code:
INSTALLED_APPS = ['accounts','vendor','menu','marketplace','customers','orders']
AUTH_USER_MODEL = 'accounts.User'
implementation: Clone o repo e configure .env com decouple.

nodes.title: foodOnline/settings.py
nodes.description: Secrets via decouple, PostGIS, context processors e middleware customizado.

nodes.title: urls.py
nodes.description: Roteador raiz: accounts, vendor, marketplace, cart, checkout e orders.
nodes.code:
urlpatterns = [
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),
    path('', views.home, name='home'),
    path('', include('accounts.urls')),
    path('vendor/', include('vendor.urls')),
    path('cart/', MarketplaceViews.cart, name='cart'),
    path('orders/', include('orders.urls')),
]
implementation: Sirva MEDIA com static() em DEBUG.
Rota search e checkout no marketplace.

nodes.title: accounts
nodes.description: Auth customizada com roles Vendor (1) e Customer (2).
nodes.code:
USERNAME_FIELD = 'email'
VENDOR = 1
CUSTOMER = 2
implementation: Views de registro, login e ativação.

nodes.title: User
nodes.description: User customizado com email único e campo role.
nodes.code:
class User(AbstractBaseUser):
    VENDOR = 1
    CUSTOMER = 2
    email = models.EmailField(max_length=100, unique=True)
    role = models.PositiveSmallIntegerField(choices=ROLE_CHOICE)
    USERNAME_FIELD = 'email'

nodes.title: check_role_vendor()
nodes.description: Decorators RBAC que restringem dashboards por role.

nodes.title: registerUser()
nodes.description: Cadastro de Customer com create_user e e-mail de verificação.
nodes.code:
user = User.objects.create_user(
    first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name,
    username=username, email=email, password=password)
user.role = User.CUSTOMER
user.save()
send_verification_email(request, user, mail_subject, email_template)

nodes.title: registerVendor()
nodes.description: Cadastro de restaurante: User + Vendor + slug único.
nodes.code:
user.role = User.VENDOR
vendor = v_form.save(commit=False)
vendor.user = user
vendor.vendor_slug = slugify(vendor_name)+'-'+str(user.id)
vendor.user_profile = user_profile
vendor.save()

nodes.title: activate()
nodes.description: Ativa conta via uid/token do e-mail.
nodes.code:
uid = urlsafe_base64_decode(uidb64).decode()
user = User._default_manager.get(pk=uid)
if user is not None and default_token_generator.check_token(user, token):
    user.is_active = True
    user.save()

nodes.title: vendor
nodes.description: Perfil de restaurante, horários e aprovação admin.

nodes.title: Vendor
nodes.description: Modelo Vendor com slug e verificação de horário.

nodes.title: menu
nodes.description: Categorias e itens de comida por vendor.

nodes.title: FoodItem
nodes.description: Item do cardápio com preço e disponibilidade.
nodes.code:
class FoodItem(models.Model):
    vendor = models.ForeignKey(Vendor, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    food_title = models.CharField(max_length=50)
    price = models.DecimalField(max_digits=10, decimal_places=2)
    is_available = models.BooleanField(default=True)

nodes.title: marketplace
nodes.description: Listagem, carrinho AJAX e busca geoespacial.
nodes.code:
class Cart(models.Model):
    user = models.ForeignKey(User, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    fooditem = models.ForeignKey(FoodItem, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    quantity = models.PositiveIntegerField()

nodes.title: get_cart_counter()
nodes.description: Context processor com badge de quantidade no navbar.

nodes.title: add_to_cart()
nodes.description: Adiciona item via AJAX incrementando quantity.

nodes.title: search()
nodes.description: Busca vendors por keyword e raio PostGIS.
nodes.code:
pnt = GEOSGeometry('POINT(%s %s)' % (longitude, latitude))
vendors = Vendor.objects.filter(
    user_profile__location__distance_lte=(pnt, D(km=radius))
).annotate(distance=Distance('user_profile__location', pnt))

nodes.title: orders
nodes.description: Checkout multi-vendor, Payment e OrderedFood.
nodes.code:
class Order(models.Model):
    order_number = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    tax_data = models.JSONField(blank=True, null=True)
    is_ordered = models.BooleanField(default=False)

nodes.title: place_order()
nodes.description: Cria pedido pendente agrupando taxas por vendor.
nodes.code:
client = razorpay.Client(auth=(RZP_KEY_ID, RZP_KEY_SECRET))
order.tax_data = json.dumps(tax_data)
order.total_data = json.dumps(total_data)
order.order_number = generate_order_number(order.id)
order.vendors.add(*vendors_id)

nodes.title: payments()
nodes.description: Confirma pagamento AJAX e notifica vendors.
nodes.code:
payment = Payment(
    user=request.user,
    transaction_id=transaction_id,
    amount=order.total,
    status=status)
order.is_ordered = True
cart_items.delete()
return JsonResponse({'order_number': order_number})

name: JavaScriptDropBoxProject
summary: Clone Dropbox no browser com Firebase Realtime Database e Storage.

nodes.title: JavaScriptDropBoxProject
nodes.description: Armazenamento em nuvem estilo Dropbox com Express e Firebase.

nodes.title: app.js
nodes.description: Servidor Express com EJS e static em public/.

nodes.title: routes/index.js
nodes.description: Rotas Express para home, upload e delete de arquivos locais.
implementation: GET /file serve arquivo por query path.

nodes.title: DropBoxController
nodes.description: Classe principal: navegação, upload, rename e delete no Firebase.
implementation: Instancie no index.js após DOM ready.
Bind events nos botões da UI.

nodes.title: connDatabase()
nodes.description: Inicializa Firebase App com config do projeto.
implementation: Realtime DB + Storage no mesmo projeto.

nodes.title: getFirebaseRef()
nodes.description: Retorna database ref do caminho atual.

nodes.title: openFolder()
nodes.description: Atualiza breadcrumb e lista arquivos da pasta atual.
implementation: Duplo-clique em pasta faz push no currentFolder.

nodes.title: readFiles()
nodes.description: Escuta Firebase e renderiza lista de arquivos.

nodes.title: uploadTask()
nodes.description: Envia arquivos ao Firebase Storage com progresso.

nodes.title: uploadProgress()
nodes.description: Atualiza barra de progresso e tempo restante.

nodes.title: initEvents()
nodes.description: Bind de botões nova pasta, delete, rename e upload.

nodes.title: removeFolder()
nodes.description: Remove pasta recursivamente do Firebase.

nodes.title: removeFile()
nodes.description: Remove arquivo do Firebase Storage.
implementation: Remove também ref no Realtime DB.

nodes.title: renderNav()
nodes.description: Breadcrumb clicável da pilha currentFolder.

nodes.title: getSelection()
nodes.description: Retorna itens .selected na listagem.

nodes.title: getFileIconView()
nodes.description: SVG por MIME type: folder, image, pdf, doc.

nodes.title: index.js
nodes.description: Bootstrap da SPA instanciando o controller.
nodes.code: window.app = new DropBoxController();
implementation: Carregue após DOM e Firebase SDK.

nodes.title: POST /upload
nodes.description: Upload local alternativo com formidable (legado).

nodes.title: GET /file
nodes.description: Serve arquivo do disco por query path.

nodes.title: formatTimeToHuman()
nodes.description: Formata milissegundos em texto PT-BR.

name: JavaScriptRestfulApiProject
summary: API REST de usuários com NeDB, consign e express-validator.

nodes.title: JavaScriptRestfulApiProject
nodes.description: API REST com Express, consign e banco NeDB embarcado.

nodes.title: index.js
nodes.description: Bootstrap Express com body-parser e consign.

nodes.title: routes/index.js
nodes.description: Rota raiz HTML de boas-vindas.

nodes.title: routes/users.js
nodes.description: CRUD completo GET/POST/PUT/DELETE em /users.

nodes.title: GET /users
nodes.description: Lista todos os usuários ordenados por nome.

nodes.title: POST /users
nodes.description: Insere novo usuário após validação.

nodes.title: GET /users/:id
nodes.description: Busca um usuário pelo _id do NeDB.

nodes.title: PUT /users/:id
nodes.description: Atualiza usuário existente no NeDB.

nodes.title: DELETE /users/:id
nodes.description: Remove usuário do banco NeDB.

nodes.title: GET /users/admin
nodes.description: Rota mock com lista fixa de admins.

nodes.title: NeDB
nodes.description: Banco embarcado com autoload em users.db.

nodes.title: utils/validator.js
nodes.description: Valida nome obrigatório e e-mail válido no POST/PUT.

nodes.title: utils/error.js
nodes.description: Padroniza respostas de erro da API.

nodes.title: consign()
nodes.description: Carrega routes/ e utils/ automaticamente no app.
nodes.code: consign().include('routes').include('utils').into(app);

nodes.title: body-parser
nodes.description: Parse JSON e urlencoded com limite 50mb.
nodes.code:
app.use(bodyParser.urlencoded({ extended: false, limit:'50mb' }));
app.use(bodyParser.json({limit:'50mb'}));

nodes.title: express-validator
nodes.description: Middleware global de validação.
nodes.code:
const expressValidator = require('express-validator');
app.use(expressValidator());

nodes.title: routeId
nodes.description: Agrupa rotas REST por :id.

nodes.title: package.json
nodes.description: Dependências e entry point index.js.
nodes.code:
"main": "index.js",
"dependencies": {
  "express": "^4.18.2",
  "nedb": "^1.8.0",
  "consign": "^0.1.6",
  "express-validator": "^5.3.1"
}

nodes.title: app.listen()
nodes.description: Inicia servidor na porta 4000.

nodes.title: Tratamento de erros
nodes.description: Padrão if(err) em todos os callbacks NeDB.

name: Professional-Scanner
summary: Scanner de rede profissional com mapa 3D e export XLSX.

nodes.title: Professional-Scanner
nodes.description: Scanner de rede com WebSocket, ping, port scan e export Excel.

nodes.title: Express static
nodes.description: Serve dashboard e mapa da pasta public/.
nodes.code:
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, 'public')));
app.use(express.json({ limit: '5mb' }));

nodes.title: WebSocket Server
nodes.description: Comunicação em tempo real entre servidor e dashboard.
implementation: Broadcast logs e resultados via ws.send.

nodes.description: Expande IP único, range ou CIDR em lista de IPs.

nodes.description: Ping sweep Windows com extração de TTL.

nodes.description: Heurística de SO a partir do TTL.

nodes.title: scanTcpPort()

nodes.description: Detecta VM por prefixo MAC ou vendor.

nodes.description: Dashboard com WebSocket, tabela e progresso.

nodes.title: handleServerMessage()
nodes.description: Processa eventos log, progress, host_found.

nodes.title: public/map.js
nodes.description: Visualização topológica 3D com force-graph.

nodes.title: render3DMap()
nodes.description: Grafo 3D: nós host ligados a subnets.
nodes.code:
Graph = ForceGraph3D()(mapContainer)
  .graphData({ nodes, links })
  .nodeAutoColorBy('group')
  .nodeLabel(node => `IP: ${node.id}\n${node.name || ''}`)
  .onNodeClick(node => { /* highlight row */ });
